title: hymenasplenium nigricostatum
intro: Hymenasplenium nigricostatum, also known as the black-costum spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Hymenasplenium nigricostatum include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying the leaves and using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
